case_title: BRAUND DESIGN INC VS HECKAMAN LARRY D. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $930.00 FILED BY BRAUND DESIGN INC AS TO DEFENDANT HECKAMAN LARRY D. ROBERT WOLFE & ASSOC., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRAUND DESIGN INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HECKAMAN LARRY D. ROBERT WOLFE & ASSOC., INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO (ROBERT WOLFE & ASSOC) RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.
